name: UniswapV3LPHelper
description: Weiroll-compatible stateless helper for Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity management — computes tick ranges, detects rebalance conditions, and calculates optimal token amounts

inputs.name: rangeBps
inputs.description: Half-width in basis points (e.g. 500 = ±5% from current price)

outputs.name: tickLower
outputs.description: Lower tick boundary, aligned to tickSpacing

outputs.name: tickUpper
outputs.description: Upper tick boundary, aligned to tickSpacing

calculateRangeTicks.description: Compute tick-spacing-aligned lower and upper tick bounds centered on the pool's current price

inputs.name: tokenId
inputs.description: NFT token ID of the LP position

inputs.name: bufferBps
inputs.description: Buffer in basis points that widens the no-rebalance zone (0 = rebalance as soon as tick exits range)

outputs.name: rebalance
outputs.description: True if current tick is outside the buffered range and rebalancing is needed

shouldRebalance.description: Check whether an LP position has drifted out of its active range and needs rebalancing

inputs.name: pool
inputs.description: Uniswap V3 pool address (reads current sqrtPriceX96)

inputs.name: tickLower
inputs.description: Lower tick of the target range (must be spacing-aligned)

inputs.name: tickUpper
inputs.description: Upper tick of the target range (must be spacing-aligned)

inputs.name: amount0Available
inputs.description: Maximum token0 the caller can spend

inputs.name: amount1Available
inputs.description: Maximum token1 the caller can spend

outputs.name: amount0Desired
outputs.description: Token0 amount to use for minting (≤ amount0Available)

outputs.name: amount1Desired
outputs.description: Token1 amount to use for minting (≤ amount1Available)

computeOptimalAmounts.description: Calculate the maximum-liquidity token amounts for a given tick range given available balances
